CatExtract.name: Cat Extract
CatExtract.effects: [Poison] Emote: Meow @20%; [Poison] Effect: Polymorph (if OrganType, >50u); [Poison] Removes 20u CatExtract (if >50u)

Cellulose.name: cellulose fibers
Cellulose.desc: A crystaline polydextrose polymer, plants swear by this stuff.

ChangelingSting.name: Changeling Sting
ChangelingSting.desc: You take a tiny sip and feel a burning sensation...
ChangelingSting.antagTips: Only from EMAG'd Shambler's Juice machine. Changeling-themed reagent with unique effects.

Chitoectesin.name: Chitoectesin
Chitoectesin.effects: [Poison] Deals Poison 0.5 Deals Caustic 0.5; [Poison] Effect: Polymorph (if MetabolizerTypeCondition, ReagentCondition)

ChloralHydrate.name: chloral hydrate
ChloralHydrate.desc: A sedative and hypnotic chemical. Commonly used to put other people to sleep, whether they want to or not.
ChloralHydrate.effects: [Bloodstream] Emote: Yawn @10%; [Bloodstream] Speed walk=0.65 sprint=0.65; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 1.5 (if ReagentCondition)
ChloralHydrate.antagTips: Puts target to sleep almost instantly. 15-20u is enough. Combine with a lethal toxin for guaranteed silent kill. The #1 antag chemical.

Chlorine.name: chlorine
Chlorine.desc: A yellow-green gas which is toxic to humans.

ChlorineTrifluoride.name: chlorine trifluoride
ChlorineTrifluoride.desc: You really, REALLY don't want to get this shit anywhere near you.
ChlorineTrifluoride.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Heat 2 Deals Poison 1 Deals Caustic 0.5; [Bloodstream] Flammable; [Bloodstream] Temp +6000
ChlorineTrifluoride.antagTips: The most dangerous chemical. Extreme fire+toxic damage, ignites on contact, melts almost anything. Synthesis requires >370K — WILL EXPLODE if container breaks. Handle with extreme care.

Chronexaline.name: Chronexaline
Chronexaline.effects: [Medicine] Heals Radiation 5 (if temp cond, MobStateCondition); [Medicine] Removes 0.5u Chronexaline (if MetabolizerTypeCondition)

CocoaPowder.name: cocoa powder
CocoaPowder.desc: From the best varieties of cocoa beans

CoconutRum.name: coconut rum
CoconutRum.desc: Rum with coconut for that tropical feel.

CoconutWater.name: coconut water
CoconutWater.desc: A favorite of survivors on deserted islands.

Coffee.name: coffee
Coffee.desc: A drink made from brewed coffee beans. Contains a moderate amount of caffeine.

CoffeeLiqueur.name: coffee liqueur
CoffeeLiqueur.desc: Liquor flavoured with cold brewed coffee and spices.

CogChamp.name: Cogchamp
CogChamp.desc: Not even Ratvar's Four Generals could withstand this! Qevax Jryy!

Cognac.name: cognac
Cognac.desc: A sweet and strongly alcoholic drink, twice distilled and left to mature for several years. Classy as fornication.

Cognizine.name: cognizine
Cognizine.desc: A mysterious chemical which is able to make any non-sentient creature sentient.

Coldsauce.name: coldsauce
Coldsauce.desc: Leaves the tongue numb in its passage.

ConcentratedCorgiJuice.name: Concentrated Corgi Juice
ConcentratedCorgiJuice.desc: Tastes like dog food. Clearly an acquired taste.
ConcentratedCorgiJuice.effects: [Poison] Deals Cellular 0.5 (if ReagentCondition); [Poison] Message popup @15%; [Poison] Effect: Polymorph (if ReagentCondition); [Poison] Status: RatvarianLanguage; [Poison] Removes 20u ConcentratedCorgiJuice (if ReagentCondition); [Poison] Adds 0.1u ConcentratedCorgiJuice (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Medicine] Heals Airloss 2 Heals Brute 2 Heals Burn 2 Heals Toxin 2; [Medicine] Thirst x2; [Medicine] Hunger x2

Copper.name: copper
Copper.desc: A soft, malleable, and ductile metal with very high thermal and electrical conductivity.
Copper.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.1 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Blood level 0.4 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition)

CopperBlood.name: blue blood
CopperBlood.desc: Contains copper as opposed to iron which gives it a distinct blue color.
CopperBlood.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x1.0 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Digestion] Heals Brute 3 (even) Heals Burn 1.25 (even) (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.2

CorgiJuice.name: corgium
CorgiJuice.desc: Tastes like dog food. Clearly an acquired taste.
CorgiJuice.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Cellular 0.5 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Effect: Polymorph (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Removes 20u CorgiJuice (if ReagentCondition)

Cornoil.name: corn oil
Cornoil.desc: Corn oil, A delicious oil used in cooking. Made from corn.

Cosmopolitan.name: cosmopolitan
Cosmopolitan.desc: Even in the worst situations, nothing beats a fresh cosmopolitan.

Cream.name: cream
Cream.desc: The fatty, still liquid part of milk. Why don't you mix this with sum scotch, eh?

CreamOfCoconut.name: cream of coconut
CreamOfCoconut.desc: Sweet, syrupy version of coconut cream with added sugar.

CrushDepth.name: crush depth
CrushDepth.desc: A stygian drink, harkening back to the abyssopelagic. Dark and Cold, it serves as a reminder that the most ancient emotion is fear, and the strongest type of fear is that of the unknown.

Cryoxadone.name: cryoxadone
Cryoxadone.desc: Required for the proper function of cryogenics. Heals all standard types of damage, but only works in temperatures under 213K. It can treat and rejuvenate plants when applied in small doses.
Cryoxadone.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Airloss 3 (even) Heals Brute 2 (even) Heals Burn 2 (even) Heals Toxin 2 (even) (if temp cond)

CubaLibre.name: Cuba libre
CubaLibre.desc: Rum, mixed with cola. Viva la revolucion.

Cyanide.name: Cyanide
Cyanide.effects: [Poison] Deals Poison 0.75 Deals Asphyxiation 0.25 (if OrganType); [Poison] Paralyze (if OrganType) @5%; [Poison] Emote: Gasp (if OrganType) @10%

CycloriteBlood.name: Cyclorite Blood
CycloriteBlood.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x1.0 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Digestion] Heals Brute 3 (even) Heals Burn 1.25 (even) (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.2; [Poison] Deals Caustic 1 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Poison] Message popup (if MetabolizerTypeCondition) @20%; [Poison] Emote: Scream (if MetabolizerTypeCondition) @20%; [Medicine] Heals Brute 3 Heals Burn 1.25 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition)

Daiquiri.name: daiquiri
Daiquiri.desc: A classic rum cocktail which remains popular even in the cold reaches of space.

DarkBlood.name: Dark Blood
DarkBlood.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x1.0 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Digestion] Heals Brute 3 (even) Heals Burn 1.25 (even) (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.2; [Poison] Status: ModifyStatusEffect (if ReagentCondition)

DarkandStormy.name: dark & stormy
DarkandStormy.desc: You can almost hear the thunder.

DeadRum.name: deadrum
DeadRum.desc: Distilled alcoholic drink made from saltwater.

DeathInTheAfternoon.name: death in the afternoon
DeathInTheAfternoon.desc: "Pour one jigger absinthe into a Champagne glass. Add iced Champagne until it attains the proper opalescent milkiness. Drink three to five of these slowly." - Ernest Hemingway

Dermaline.name: dermaline
Dermaline.desc: An advanced chemical that is more effective at treating burn damage than kelotane.
Dermaline.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Heat 1.5 Heals Shock 1.5 Heals Cold 1.5; [Bloodstream] Deals Asphyxiation 1 Deals Cold 2 Deals Blunt 0.5 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Jitter (if ReagentCondition)

Desoxyephedrine.name: desoxyephedrine
Desoxyephedrine.desc: A more effective ephedrine, with more active downsides. Requires less doses to cure narcolepsy.
Desoxyephedrine.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.55 Deals Blunt 1.1; [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 3 Deals Asphyxiation 2 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Speed walk=1.2 sprint=1.2; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Status: Adrenaline; [Bloodstream] Jitter; [Bloodstream] Status: Stutter; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Resets narcolepsy (if ReagentCondition)
Desoxyephedrine.antagTips: Space Meth — extreme speed boost but causes jitteriness and brain damage at high doses. High risk, high reward self-buff.

Deunomia.name: Deunomia
Deunomia.effects: [Medicine] Deals Cellular 5; [Medicine] Jitter (if >0.5u); [Medicine] Emote: Scream @30%; [Medicine] Effect: CureChangelingInfection (if >1u)

Dexalin.name: dexalin
Dexalin.desc: Used for treating minor oxygen deprivation and bloodloss. A required reagent for dexalin plus.
Dexalin.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Asphyxiation 1 Heals Bloodloss 0.5; [Bloodstream] Deals Asphyxiation 3 Deals Cold 1 (if ReagentCondition)

DexalinPlus.name: dexalin plus
DexalinPlus.desc: Used in treatment of extreme cases of oxygen deprivation and bloodloss. Flushes heartbreaker toxin out of the blood stream.
DexalinPlus.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Asphyxiation 3.5 Heals Bloodloss 3; [Bloodstream] Removes 3u HeartbreakerToxin (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Asphyxiation 5 Deals Cold 3 (if ReagentCondition)

Diethylamine.name: diethylamine
Diethylamine.desc: A very potent fertilizer, treats plants with nutrients, eliminates pests, and sometimes it can even speed up growth.

Diphenhydramine.name: diphenhydramine
Diphenhydramine.desc: Rapidly purges the body of histamine, reduces jitteriness, causes drowsiness, and treats poison damage. Often included in sleep medication.
Diphenhydramine.effects: [Bloodstream] Removes 3.0u Histamine; [Bloodstream] Status: Jitter; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Heals Poison 3

Diphenylmethylamine.name: diphenylmethylamine
Diphenylmethylamine.desc: A more stable medicine than ethyloxyephedrine. Useful for keeping someone awake.
Diphenylmethylamine.effects: [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Resets narcolepsy (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Message popup @10%

DoctorsDelight.name: The Doctor's Delight
DoctorsDelight.desc: A gulp a day keeps the MediBot away. That's probably for the best.
DoctorsDelight.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x2; [Digestion] Hunger x-2; [Digestion] Heals Burn 1 (even) Heals Brute 1 (even) Heals Airloss 1 (even) Heals Toxin 1 (even)

Doxarubixadone.name: doxarubixadone
Doxarubixadone.desc: A cryogenics chemical. Heals cellular damage caused by dangerous gasses and chemicals.

DrGibb.name: Dr. Gibb
DrGibb.desc: A delicious blend of 42 different flavours.

DriestMartini.name: driest martini
DriestMartini.desc: Only for the experienced. You think you see sand floating in the glass.

Dylovene.name: dylovene
Dylovene.desc: A broad-spectrum anti-toxin, which treats toxin damage in organisms. Overdosing will cause vomiting, dizzyness and pain.
Dylovene.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Poison 1; [Bloodstream] Deals Blunt 2 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Jitter (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Message popup (if ReagentCondition) @20%; [Bloodstream] Vomit (if ReagentCondition) @2%; [Bloodstream] Drunk (if ReagentCondition)

EZNutrient.name: EZ nutrient
EZNutrient.desc: Give your plants some of those EZ nutrients! Dionas find this delicious.

Ebifin.name: Ebifin
Ebifin.effects: [Medicine] Heals Heat 30 Heals Cold 24 Heals Shock 24 Heals Caustic 18; [Medicine] Adds 3u Tehifin; [Medicine] Deals Blunt 30 (if >4u); [Medicine] Bleed 2 (if >4u); [Medicine] Removes 25u Syriniver; [Medicine] Removes 50u Ebifin; [Medicine] Removes 25u ProcenylLazide; [Medicine] Removes 25u Aluite

EdgeEssentia.name: Edge Essentia
EdgeEssentia.effects: [Poison] Effect: BleedSanguinePerniculate @50%; [Poison] Bleed 0.3; [Poison] Removes 0.2u EdgeEssentia; [Poison] Deals Poison 0.2

ElectricShark.name: electric shark
ElectricShark.desc: Fun Shark fact: Selachians make up 20% of Space Station 16’s Engineering staff!

Empress75.name: empress 75
Empress75.desc: A more refined take on the mimosa. Just the thing Marie Antoinette might've sipped on before the revolution.

EnergyDrink.name: Red Bool
EnergyDrink.desc: A dose of energy! Nanotrasen is not responsible if you grow avian appendages.

Ephedrine.name: ephedrine
Ephedrine.desc: A caffeinated adrenaline stimulator chemical that makes you faster and harder to knock down. Also helps combat narcolepsy at dosages over thirty, at the cost of severe nerval stress.
Ephedrine.effects: [Bloodstream] Speed walk=1.15 sprint=1.15; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Effect: ModifyKnockdown; [Bloodstream] Jitter; [Bloodstream] Message popup @5%; [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 2 Deals Asphyxiation 2 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Resets narcolepsy (if ReagentCondition)
Ephedrine.antagTips: Stimulant — gives speed boost and reduces stun time. Self-buff before combat. Component of meth.

Epinephrine.name: epinephrine
Epinephrine.desc: An effective stabilizing chemical used to keep a critical person from dying to asphyxiation while patching up minor damage during crit. Flushes heartbreaker toxin out the blood stream at the cost of more epinephrine, but may add histamine. Helps reduce stun time. Commonly found in the form of emergency medipens.
Epinephrine.effects: [Bloodstream] Removes 5u Histamine (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Heals Asphyxiation 3 Heals Poison 0.5 (if MobStateCondition, ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Heals Brute 0.5 (even) Heals Burn 0.5 (even) (if MobStateCondition, ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Asphyxiation 1 Deals Poison 1 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Removes 2u HeartbreakerToxin; [Bloodstream] Removes 1u Epinephrine (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Adds 4u Histamine (if ReagentCondition) @10%; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Effect: ModifyKnockdown; [Bloodstream] Status: Adrenaline

EspressoMartini.name: espresso martini
EspressoMartini.desc: To wake you up and wind you down. Garnished with coffee beans and icy-cold.

Ethanol.name: ethanol
Ethanol.desc: A simple alcohol, makes you drunk if consumed, flammable.
Ethanol.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x2; [Metabolites] Deals Poison 0.1 (if ReagentCondition, MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Metabolites] Deals Poison 0.02 (if ReagentCondition, MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Metabolites] Heals Brute 0.1 (even) (if ReagentCondition, MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Metabolites] Vomit (if ReagentCondition, MetabolizerTypeCondition) @4%; [Metabolites] Drunk

Ethyloxyephedrine.name: ethyloxyephedrine
Ethyloxyephedrine.desc: A mildly unstable medicine derived from desoxyephedrine, primarily used to combat narcolepsy.
Ethyloxyephedrine.effects: [Bloodstream] Jitter; [Bloodstream] Status: Stutter; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Resets narcolepsy (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Message popup @10%

Ethylredoxrazine.name: ethylredoxrazine
Ethylredoxrazine.desc: Neutralises the effects of alcohol in the blood stream. Though it is commonly needed, it is rarely requested.

Fat.name: fat
Fat.desc: No matter how it was obtained, its application is important.

Felinase.name: felinase
Felinase.desc: A type of carcinogenic enzyme known to break down proteins found within the vocal cords of most animals. Mixing is NOT recommended.
Felinase.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Radiation 0.5 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Removes 5u Felinase (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Emote: Cough (if ReagentCondition) @5%; [Bloodstream] Message popup @5%

Fentanyl.name: Fentanyl
Fentanyl.effects: [Poison] Heals Brute 1 Heals Heat 0.5 Heals Shock 0.5 Heals Cold 0.5 Heals Radiation 0.5 (if OrganType); [Poison] Deals Poison 0.25 (if OrganType); [Poison] Deals Poison 0.25 Deals Asphyxiation 0.75 (if OrganType, >5u); [Poison] Deals Slash 1 (if OrganType, >5u) @5%; [Narcotic] Message popup @5%; [Narcotic] Message popup (if >5u) @5%; [Narcotic] Effect: MovespeedModifier (if OrganType); [Narcotic] Status: Stutter; [Narcotic] Jitter; [Narcotic] Paralyze (if OrganType) @5%; [Narcotic] Paralyze (if OrganType, >5u) @5%; [Narcotic] Status: SeeingRainbows; [Narcotic] Drunk; [Narcotic] Emote: Scream @5%; [Medicine] Effect: SuppressPain

FerrochromicAcid.name: ferrochromic acid
FerrochromicAcid.desc: A mildy corrosive solution, unable of causing severe danger unless ingested.
FerrochromicAcid.effects: [Bloodstream] Thirst x-1.5; [Bloodstream] Deals Heat 2.5 Deals Caustic 1

Fersilicite.name: fersilicite
Fersilicite.desc: An intermetallic compound with unusual magnetic properties at low temperatures.

Fiber.name: fiber
Fiber.desc: A raw material, usually extracted from wool or other fabric products.

FineRockDust.name: Fine Rock Dust
FineRockDust.effects: [Narcotic] Emote: Cough (if OrganType) @5%; [Narcotic] Emote: Gasp (if OrganType) @2%; [Narcotic] Message popup (if OrganType) @5%; [Narcotic] Message popup (if OrganType) @1%

Fluorine.name: fluorine
Fluorine.desc: A highly toxic pale yellow gas. Extremely reactive.

FluorosulfuricAcid.name: fluorosulfuric acid
FluorosulfuricAcid.desc: A highly corrosive chemical, capable of leaving quite a mark on your skin.
FluorosulfuricAcid.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Caustic 8; [Bloodstream] Message popup @33%; [Bloodstream] Emote: Scream @25%
FluorosulfuricAcid.antagTips: Highly corrosive acid. Similar to Polytrinic but slightly weaker. Good in foam grenades for corridor denial.

Fluorosurfactant.name: fluorosurfactant
Fluorosurfactant.desc: A perfluoronated sulfonic acid that forms a foam when mixed with water.
Fluorosurfactant.antagTips: Creates foam when mixed with water. The foam carries ALL other chemicals in the beaker. Key ingredient for chemical foam grenades.

FoamingAgent.name: foaming agent
FoamingAgent.desc: Makes foam such as that's required in metal foam grenades.
FoamingAgent.antagTips: Creates metal foam with iron/aluminium. Used in metal foam grenades to seal corridors or trap people.

Formaldehyde.name: Formaldehyde
Formaldehyde.effects: [Poison] Deals Poison 0.1 (if MobStateCondition); [Medicine] Effect: ReduceRotting (if MobStateCondition); [Medicine] Adds 0.2u Histamine (if >30u) @10%

FourteenLoko.name: Fourteen Loko
FourteenLoko.desc: A highly processed liquid substance barely-passing intergalatic health standards for a soft drink.

Fresium.name: Fresium
Fresium.desc: A mysterious compound that slows the vibration of atoms and molecules... somehow. In layman's terms, it makes things cold... REALLY cold. Can cause long-lasting movement issues if ingested.
Fresium.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Cold 0.01 Heals Heat 3; [Bloodstream] Message popup (if ReagentCondition) @5%; [Bloodstream] Message popup (if ReagentCondition) @20%; [Bloodstream] Temp -10000 (if temp cond); [Bloodstream] Speed walk=0.6 sprint=0.6 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Speed walk=0.0 sprint=0.0 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Message popup (if ReagentCondition) @40%
Fresium.antagTips: Creates extreme cold. Mixed with water causes flash-freeze. Can freeze pipes and create ice hazards.

Frezon.name: frezon
Frezon.desc: A highly effective coolant.. and hallucinogenic.
Frezon.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Cellular 0.5; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Drunk; [Bloodstream] Message popup @10%; [Bloodstream] Message popup @10%; [Respiration] Deals Cellular 0.05; [Respiration] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Respiration] Drunk; [Respiration] Message popup @10%; [Respiration] Message popup @10%

FrostOil.name: Frost Oil
FrostOil.desc: Frost Oil is the ingredient found in chilly peppers, a rare pepper mutation.
FrostOil.effects: [Digestion] Temp -250; [Digestion] Deals Cold 1 (if ReagentCondition); [Digestion] Message popup @20%

GastroToxin.name: gastrotoxin
GastroToxin.desc: A moderately toxic byproduct of decomposition. Most commonly found in spoiled food.
GastroToxin.antagTips: Causes severe nausea and vomiting. Target drops items and can't eat/drink. Good for disruption without killing.

Genecide.name: Genecide
Genecide.effects: [Medicine] Heals Genetic 6; [Medicine] Deals Heat 1 Deals Blunt 1 Deals Piercing 1; [Medicine] Explosion

Gildlager.name: Gildlager
Gildlager.desc: 100 proof cinnamon schnapps, made for alcoholic teen girls on spring break.

Gin.name: gin
Gin.desc: A distilled alcoholic drink that derives its predominant flavour from juniper berries.

GinTonic.name: gin and tonic
GinTonic.desc: An all time classic, mild cocktail.

GoblinBlood.name: Goblin Blood
GoblinBlood.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x1.0 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Digestion] Heals Brute 3 (even) Heals Burn 1.25 (even) (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.2; [Drink] Thirst x-0.5 (if OrganType); [Drink] Vomit (if OrganType) @2%; [Drink] Status: Stutter (if OrganType) @2%; [Drink] Thirst x1 (if OrganType)

Gold.name: gold
Gold.desc: Gold is a dense, soft, shiny metal and the most malleable and ductile metal known.

Granibitulari.name: Granibitulari
Granibitulari.effects: [Medicine] Heals Brute 0.3 Heals Poison 0.1 Heals Heat 0.1 Heals Shock 0.1 Heals Cold 0.1

GreyMatter.name: grey matter
GreyMatter.desc: Thought juice, the stuff that leaks out of your ears.

Gunfire.name: gunfire
Gunfire.desc: Raise a glass to the brave!

Haloperidol.name: haloperidol
Haloperidol.desc: Removes most stimulating and hallucinogenic drugs. Reduces druggy effects and jitteriness. Causes drowsiness.
Haloperidol.effects: [Bloodstream] Emote: Yawn @10%; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Status: Jitter; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Removes 3.0u Desoxyephedrine; [Bloodstream] Removes 3.0u Ephedrine; [Bloodstream] Removes 3.0u Stimulants; [Bloodstream] Removes 3.0u THC; [Bloodstream] Removes 3.0u SpaceDrugs; [Bloodstream] Removes 3.0u Bananadine; [Bloodstream] Removes 3.0u SpaceGlue; [Bloodstream] Removes 3.0u MindbreakerToxin

Happiness.name: happiness
Happiness.desc: Fills you with ecstatic numbness and causes minor brain damage. Highly addictive. If overdosed causes sudden mood swings.
Happiness.effects: [Bloodstream] Emote: Laugh (if ReagentCondition) @10%; [Bloodstream] Emote: Whistle (if ReagentCondition) @10%; [Bloodstream] Emote: Crying (if ReagentCondition) @10%; [Bloodstream] Message popup (if ReagentCondition) @20%; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect

Healium.name: Healium
Healium.effects: [Narcotic] Heals Burn 2 Heals Toxin 5 Heals Brute 2 (if <24u); [Narcotic] Heals Burn 20 Heals Toxin 50 Heals Brute 20 (if >24u); [Narcotic] Message popup (if >4u, <0.1u) @1%; [Narcotic] Status: ForcedSleep (if >8u, <0.01u); [Narcotic] Drunk (if >4u); [Gas] Heals Burn 2 Heals Toxin 5 Heals Brute 2 (if <24u); [Gas] Heals Burn 20 Heals Toxin 50 Heals Brute 20 (if >24u); [Gas] Message popup (if >4u, <0.1u) @1%; [Gas] Status: ForcedSleep (if >8u, <0.01u); [Gas] Drunk (if >4u)

HeartbreakerToxin.name: heartbreaker toxin
HeartbreakerToxin.desc: A hallucinogenic compound derived from mindbreaker toxin. it blocks neurological signals to the respiratory system, causing asphyxiation. Dexalin plus and epinephrine will filter it out, however.
HeartbreakerToxin.antagTips: Hallucinogen that also blocks respiratory signals, causing asphyxiation. More dangerous than MindbreakerToxin — can kill.

Hemorrhinol.name: hemorrhinol
Hemorrhinol.desc: A toxin that causes severe damage to blood vessels, causing rapid bleeding.
Hemorrhinol.antagTips: Causes internal bleeding. Slow but deadly — victim may not realize they're poisoned until too late. Pairs well with anticoagulants.

Heparin.name: heparin
Heparin.desc: Commonly used as an anticoagulant medication. Causes blood to have difficulty forming clots. Can cause internal bleeding when overdosed.

Hercuri.name: Hercuri
Hercuri.effects: [Medicine] Heals Heat 3; [Medicine] Heals Heat 3 (if TypedDamageThreshold); [Medicine] Temp -10000 (if temp cond); [Medicine] Effect: AdjustSolutionThermalEnergyEffect

Herignis.name: Herignis
Herignis.effects: [Medicine] Heals Cold 3; [Medicine] Heals Cold 3 (if TypedDamageThreshold); [Medicine] Temp +10000 (if temp cond); [Medicine] Effect: AdjustSolutionThermalEnergyEffect

Heroin.name: Heroin
Heroin.effects: [Medicine] Effect: SuppressPain; [Medicine] Status: Adrenaline; [Medicine] Deals Poison 2 Deals Cold 0.25 Deals Asphyxiation 0.75 (if >10.5u, OrganType); [Medicine] Status: SeeingRainbows (if >10.5u); [Medicine] Drunk (if >10.5u); [Medicine] Effect: AdjustConsciousness

HippiesDelight.name: Hippie's Delight
HippiesDelight.desc: You just don't get it maaaan.

Histamine.name: histamine
Histamine.desc: A chemical caused by allergenics reacting with antibodies. Lethal at large quantities.
Histamine.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Blunt 2 @10%; [Bloodstream] Deals Blunt 2 Deals Asphyxiation 2 Deals Poison 2 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Message popup @10%; [Bloodstream] Message popup (if ReagentCondition) @20%
Histamine.antagTips: Causes allergic reaction. Low doses: itching and rashes. High doses (overdose): lethal anaphylaxis. Hard to trace as a cause of death.

Holywater.name: holy water
Holywater.desc: The cleanest and purest of waters straight from the hands of god, is known to magically heal wounds.
Holywater.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x3; [Digestion] Heals Blunt 0.2 Heals Poison 0.2 Heals Heat 0.2 Heals Shock 0.2 Heals Cold 0.2

Honk.name: honk
Honk.desc: A toxin found in bananium. Causes severe honking and internal bleeding, may also cause the patient to mutate.
Honk.effects: [Bloodstream] Emote: Honk @20%; [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.06 (if ReagentCondition, MetabolizerTypeCondition)

Hooch.name: hooch
Hooch.desc: Either someone's failure at cocktail making or attempt in alchohol production. In any case, do you really want to drink that?

Hydroxide.name: hydroxide

IceCafe.name: ice café

IceCream.name: ice cream

IcedBeer.name: iced beer
IcedBeer.desc: A beer which is so cold the air around it freezes.

IcedCoffee.name: iced coffee
IcedCoffee.desc: Coffee and ice, refreshing and cool.

IcedTea.name: iced tea
IcedTea.desc: No relation to a certain rap artist/actor.

Ichor.name: ichor
Ichor.desc: An extremely potent regenerative chemical, perfected by space fauna evolution. Produced in the dragon's digestive system, it is seen as an exotic commodity due to the gargantuan effort of hunting for it.

Ichorosil.name: Ichorosil
Ichorosil.effects: [Medicine] Effect: ModifyBleed; [Medicine] Heals Burn 0.7 (even) Heals Airloss 0.5 (even) Heals Brute 0.8 (even); [Medicine] Thirst x4

Impedrezene.name: impedrezene
Impedrezene.desc: A narcotic that impedes one's ability by slowing down the higher brain cell functions.

Impedrezene.antagTips: Causes brain damage and confusion. Target becomes disoriented and may wander randomly. Non-lethal disruption.

Inaprovaline.name: inaprovaline
Inaprovaline.desc: Inaprovaline is a synaptic stimulant and cardiostimulant, commonly used to treat asphyxiation damage caused during critical states and reduce bleeding. Used in many advanced medicines.

InsectBlood.name: insect blood
InsectBlood.desc: Okay, this is really gross. It almost looks.. alive?

Insuzine.name: insuzine
Insuzine.desc: Rapidly repairs dead tissue caused by electrocution, but cools you slightly. Completely freezes the patient when overdosed.
Insuzine.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Shock 1.5; [Bloodstream] Removes 2u Licoxide; [Bloodstream] Removes 2u Tazinide; [Bloodstream] Temp -2500; [Bloodstream] Deals Cold 1 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Temp -30000 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Jitter (if ReagentCondition)

Iodine.name: iodine
Iodine.desc: Commonly added to table salt as a nutrient. On its own it tastes far less pleasing.

Ipecac.name: ipecac
Ipecac.desc: A rapid-acting emetic. Useful for stopping unmetabolized poisons, or mass-vomiting sessions.

IrishBool.name: Irish bool
IrishBool.desc: Like a bool in a Ireland shop.

IrishCoffee.name: Irish coffee
IrishCoffee.desc: Coffee served with irish cream. Regular cream just isn't the same!

IrishCream.name: Irish cream
IrishCream.desc: Whiskey-imbued cream. What else could you expect from the Irish.

IrishSlammer.name: Grenade Penguin
IrishSlammer.desc: What's black and white and red all over?

Iron.name: iron
Iron.desc: A silvery-grey metal which forms iron oxides (rust) with contact with air. Commonly alloyed with other elements to create alloys such as steel.
Iron.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.1 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Blood level 0.4 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition)

JuiceApple.name: apple juice
JuiceApple.desc: It's a little piece of Eden.

JuiceBanana.name: banana juice
JuiceBanana.desc: The raw essence of a banana. HONK.

JuiceBerry.name: berry juice
JuiceBerry.desc: A delicious blend of several different kinds of berries.

JuiceBerryPoison.name: poison berry juice
JuiceBerryPoison.desc: A surprisingly tasty juice blended from various kinds of very deadly and toxic berries.

JuiceBluePumpkin.name: blue pumpkin juice
JuiceBluePumpkin.desc: The juice of a blue pumpkin. Smells like pool water.

JuiceBungo.name: bungo juice
JuiceBungo.desc: The juice of a bungo fruit. Exotic!

JuiceCarrot.name: carrot juice
JuiceCarrot.desc: It's like a carrot, but less crunchy.

JuiceCherry.name: cherry juice
JuiceCherry.desc: Tasty cherry juice, sweet and tangy.

JuiceGrape.name: grape juice
JuiceGrape.desc: Freshly squeezed juice from red grapes. Quite sweet.

JuiceOrange.name: orange juice
JuiceOrange.desc: Both delicious AND rich in Vitamin C. What more do you need?

JuicePineapple.name: pineapple juice
JuicePineapple.desc: The delicious juice of a pineapple.

JuiceThatMakesYouHew.name: juice that makes you Hew
JuiceThatMakesYouHew.desc: Pure essence of inversed lizard plush. Makes you Hew!
JuiceThatMakesYouHew.effects: [Bloodstream] Emote: Hew @50%; [Bloodstream] Effect: Polymorph (if MetabolizerTypeCondition, ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Removes 20u JuiceThatMakesYouHew (if ReagentCondition)

JuiceThatMakesYouWeh.name: juice that makes you Weh
JuiceThatMakesYouWeh.desc: Pure essence of lizard plush. Makes you Weh!
JuiceThatMakesYouWeh.effects: [Bloodstream] Emote: Weh @50%; [Bloodstream] Effect: Polymorph (if MetabolizerTypeCondition, ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Removes 20u JuiceThatMakesYouWeh (if ReagentCondition)

JuiceTomato.name: tomato juice
JuiceTomato.desc: Tomatoes made into juice. What a waste of good tomatoes, huh?

JuiceWatermelon.name: watermelon juice
JuiceWatermelon.desc: The delicious juice of a watermelon.

JungleBird.name: jungle bird
JungleBird.desc: Despite the name, it’s not exceptionally popular among Voxes.

Kalimotxo.name: kalimotxo
Kalimotxo.desc: A high-class Cuba Libre, for the discerning alcoholic.

Kelotane.name: kelotane
Kelotane.desc: Treats burn damage. Overdosing greatly reduces the body's ability to retain water.
Kelotane.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Heat 0.33 Heals Shock 0.33 Heals Cold 0.33; [Bloodstream] Thirst x-10 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Message popup (if ReagentCondition) @10%

Ketchunaise.name: ketchunaise
Ketchunaise.desc: So-called Russian dressing, popular among Space Americans.

Ketchup.name: ketchup
Ketchup.desc: Made from pureed tomatoes and flavored with spices.

Lacerinol.name: lacerinol
Lacerinol.desc: A fairly unreactive chemical that boosts collagen synthesis to incredible levels, healing slash trauma.
Lacerinol.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Slash 2 Deals Heat 0.2; [Bloodstream] Deals Cold 1.5 (if ReagentCondition)

LaughinSyrup.name: laughin' syrup
LaughinSyrup.desc: The product of juicing Laughin' Peas. Fizzy, and seems to change flavour based on what it's used with!

Laughter.name: laughter
Laughter.desc: Some say that this is the best medicine, but recent studies have proven that to be untrue.

Lead.name: lead
Lead.desc: A slow-acting but incredibly lethal toxin found in steel, albeit in trace amounts. Tasteless.
Lead.antagTips: Slow-acting heavy metal poison. Hard to detect, accumulates over time. Excellent for long-term covert poisoning via food/drink.

Left4Zed.name: left-4-zed
Left4Zed.desc: A cocktail of mutagenic compounds that gives nutrients, harms and affects plant life's genome.
Left4Zed.effects: [Bloodstream] Hunger x1 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 1 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition)

LemonLimeCranberry.name: Smite Cranberry
LemonLimeCranberry.desc: Tart cranberry, Christmas, and a hint of lemon and lime.

Lemonade.name: lemonade
Lemonade.desc: Drink using lemon juice, water, and a sweetener such as cane sugar or honey.

Lenturi.name: Lenturi
Lenturi.effects: [Medicine] Heals Heat 0.6 Heals Shock 0.6 Heals Cold 0.6 (if <20u); [Medicine] Jitter (if >20u); [Medicine] Thirst x-1; [Medicine] Thirst x-3 (if >20u)

Leporazine.name: leporazine
Leporazine.desc: A chemical used to stabilize body temperature and rapidly cure cold damage. Great for unprotected EVA travel, but prevents the use of cryogenic tubes.
Leporazine.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Cold 4; [Bloodstream] Temp +100000 (if temp cond); [Bloodstream] Temp -10000 (if temp cond); [Bloodstream] Message popup @20%; [Bloodstream] Removes 5u Fresium

Lexorin.name: lexorin
Lexorin.desc: A fast-acting chemical used to asphyxiate people rapidly.
Lexorin.antagTips: Rapidly blocks oxygen absorption. 20u in a syringe or drink is lethal. Tasteless in small doses — ideal for covert assassination.

Licoxide.name: licoxide
Licoxide.desc: A synthetic battery acid. It looks... electrifying.
Licoxide.antagTips: Slow-acting toxic compound. Accumulates damage over time. Good for long-term covert poisoning operations.

Lipolicide.name: lipolicide
Lipolicide.desc: A powerful toxin that will destroy fat cells, massively reducing body weight in a short time. Deadly to those without nutriment in their body.
Lipolicide.antagTips: Breaks down fat tissue, causing hunger and weakness. Slow-acting. More of a nuisance than a threat.

Lipozine.name: lipozine
Lipozine.desc: A chemical that accelerates metabolism, causing the user to hunger faster.

Lithium.name: lithium
Lithium.desc: A soft, silvery-white alkali metal. It's highly reactive, and ignites if it makes contact with water.
Lithium.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.05; [Bloodstream] Emote: Scream @5%; [Bloodstream] Emote: Laugh @5%

LongIslandIcedTea.name: Long Island iced tea
LongIslandIcedTea.desc: The liquor cabinet, brought together in a delicious mix. Intended for middle-aged alcoholic women only.

Lye.name: lye
Lye.desc: A translucent, orange, alkaline solution used in traditional soap production.

MachineOil.name: Machine Oil
MachineOil.effects: [Food] Hunger x-1; [Food] Thirst x-1; [Narcotic] Status: SeeingRainbows

Manhattan.name: Manhattan
Manhattan.desc: The Detective's undercover drink of choice. He never could stomach gin...

ManhattanProject.name: Manhattan Project
ManhattanProject.desc: A scientist's drink of choice, for pondering ways to blow up the ship.

ManlyDorf.name: Manly Dorf
ManlyDorf.desc: Beer and Ale, brought together in a delicious mix. Intended for stout dwarves only.

Margarita.name: margarita
Margarita.desc: On the rocks with salt on the rim. Arriba~!

Martini.name: classic martini
Martini.desc: Vermouth with Gin. Not quite how 007 enjoyed it, but still delicious.

Mayo.name: mayonnaise
Mayo.desc: Creamy sauce, made from oil, egg, and some (edible) acid.

Mayojito.name: mayojito

Mayojito.effects: [Digestion] Vomit (if ReagentCondition) @50%; [Digestion] Deals Poison 0.5; [Digestion] Thirst x1

Mead.name: mead
Mead.desc: A Viking's drink, though a cheap one.

Mechanotoxin.name: mechanotoxin

MelonLiquor.name: melon liquor
MelonLiquor.desc: A relatively sweet and fruity 46 proof liquor.

Mercury.name: mercury
Mercury.desc: A silver metal which is liquid at room temperature. It's highly toxic to humans.

Microplastics.name: Microplastics
Microplastics.effects: [Poison] Deals Poison 0.25 (if OrganType) @50%; [Poison] Vomit (if >10u, OrganType) @10%; [Poison] Effect: MovespeedModifier (if OrganType, >20u); [Poison] Heals Poison 0.25 (if OrganType) @50%

Milk.name: milk
Milk.desc: An opaque white liquid produced by the mammary glands of mammals.

MilkGoat.name: goats milk

Mimeosa.name: mimeosa

Mimosa.name: mimosa

Mitotrophin.name: Mitotrophin
Mitotrophin.effects: [Medicine] Heals Brute 4 Heals Burn 2; [Medicine] Bleed -0.5; [Medicine] Blood level 3; [Food] Hunger x1.5

Mojito.name: Mojito
Mojito.desc: If it's good enough for Spesscuba, it's good enough for you.

Mold.name: mold
Mold.desc: A fungal growth, often found in dark, humid places or on expired bread. Will cause you to develop a disease if ingested.

MonkeyBusiness.name: monkey business

Monover.name: Monover
Monover.effects: [Medicine] Heals Poison 3 (if UniqueBloodstreamChemThreshold); [Medicine] Deals Brute 1 (if UniqueBloodstreamChemThreshold, OrganType)

Moonshine.name: moonshine
Moonshine.desc: Artisanal homemade liquor. What could go wrong?

MoscowMule.name: moscow mule

MouseBites.name: Mouse Bites

NFZombieBiteToxin.name: NF Zombie Bite Toxin

NTCahors.name: NeoTheology Cahors wine

Napalm.name: napalm
Napalm.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Heat 2 Deals Poison 1 Deals Caustic 0.5; [Bloodstream] Flammable
Napalm.antagTips: Sticky fire that persists. Combines heat, poison, and caustic damage. Use with foam for fire corridors. Recipe: Oil+WeldingFuel+Ethanol.

Natusixadone.name: Natusixadone
Natusixadone.effects: [Medicine] Heals Cellular 4 Heals Heat 3 (if temp cond)

Negacordrazine.name: Negacordrazine
Negacordrazine.effects: [Medicine] Heals Airloss 2 Heals Brute 1.2 Heals Burn 1.6 Heals Toxin 2 (if TotalDamage)

Neurotoxin.name: neurotoxin

NevcottaPowder.name: Nevcotta Powder
NevcottaPowder.effects: [Poison] Vomit (if >10u, OrganType) @15%; [Poison] Deals Poison 2 Deals Asphyxiation 0.25 (if OrganType); [Poison] Status: SeeingRainbows; [Poison] Paralyze (if OrganType) @5%

Nicotine.name: nicotine

Nitrium.name: Nitrium

Nitrogen.name: nitrogen

NorepinephricAcid.name: norepinephric acid

NorepinephricAcid.effects: [Bloodstream] Message popup @8%; [Bloodstream] Message popup (if ReagentCondition) @3%; [Bloodstream] Status: TemporaryBlindness (if ReagentCondition)

Nothing.name: nothing
obtainSources: EMAG Solar's Best Hot Drink vending machine
Nothing.antagTips: A mysterious reagent. Only obtainable from EMAG'd Solar's Best vending machine. Effects unknown — experimental.

NuclearCola.name: nuclear cola
NuclearCola.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x6; [Digestion] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Digestion] Deals Poison 1

Nutriment.name: nutriment
Nutriment.desc: All the vitamins, minerals, and carbohydrates the body needs in pure form.

Oats.name: oats
Oats.desc: Used for a variety of tasty purposes.

Oculine.name: oculine
Oculine.desc: A simple saline compound used to treat the eyes via ingestion.

Omnizine.name: omnizine
Omnizine.desc: A soothing milky liquid with an iridescent gleam. A well known conspiracy theory says that its origins remain a mystery because revealing the secrets of its production would render most commercial pharmaceuticals obsolete.

Opporozidone.name: opporozidone
Opporozidone.desc: A difficult to synthesize cryogenic drug used to regenerate rotting tissue and brain matter.

OrangeLimeSoda.name: citrus bikeshed
OrangeLimeSoda.desc: The soda should be orange! No, it should be lemon-lime!

Oxandrolone.name: Oxandrolone
Oxandrolone.effects: [Medicine] Heals Heat 0.2 Heals Shock 0.2 Heals Cold 0.2 (if TotalDamage); [Medicine] Heals Heat 0.8 Heals Shock 0.8 Heals Cold 0.8 (if TotalDamage); [Medicine] Heals Heat 0.8 Heals Shock 0.8 Heals Cold 0.8 Deals Blunt 2 Deals Piercing 0.5 (if >15.5u); [Medicine] Jitter (if >15.5u)

Oxycodone.name: Oxycodone
Oxycodone.effects: [Medicine] Effect: SuppressPain; [Medicine] Status: Adrenaline; [Medicine] Deals Poison 1.2 (if >10.5u, OrganType); [Medicine] Effect: AdjustConsciousness

Oxygen.name: oxygen
Oxygen.effects: [Bloodstream] Oxygenates blood (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Effect: ModifyLungGas (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 1.5 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Effect: AdjustAlert (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Respiration] Oxygenates blood (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Respiration] Effect: ModifyLungGas (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Respiration] Deals Poison 0.7 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Respiration] Effect: AdjustAlert (if MetabolizerTypeCondition)

Painkiller.name: painkiller

Patron.name: Patrón
Patron.desc: Tequila with silver in it, a favorite of alcoholic women in the club scene.

Pax.name: pax
Pax.desc: A psychiatric chemical which prevents the patient from directly harming anyone.
Pax.antagTips: Pacification drug — target cannot attack anyone. Inject into security officers to neutralize them non-lethally.

Pendetide.name: Pendetide
Pendetide.effects: [Poison] Removes 5u ?; [Poison] Deals Radiation 2 (if TypedDamageThreshold, OrganType); [Poison] Status: Stutter; [Poison] Jitter

PentenicAcid.name: Pentenic Acid
PentenicAcid.effects: [Medicine] Effect: ChemCleanBloodstream; [Medicine] Heals Poison 2 Heals Radiation 2; [Medicine] Status: RadiationProtection

PenteticAcid.effects: [Medicine] Heals Poison 3; [Medicine] Effect: ChemCleanBloodstream; [Medicine] Deals Caustic 3 (if >15.5u); [Medicine] Jitter (if >15.5u); [Medicine] Emote: Scream @30%; [Medicine] Vomit (if >15.5u) @30%

PestKiller.name: pest killer
PestKiller.desc: A mixture that targets pests. While useful it slowly poisons plants with toxins, be careful when using it.

Phalanximine.name: phalanximine
Phalanximine.desc: An advanced chemical used in the treatment of cancer. Causes moderate radiation poisoning, acid burns, and vomiting on organics. Can potentially remove the death gene on plants.
Phalanximine.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Cellular 0.3 Deals Radiation 0.15 Deals Caustic 0.15; [Bloodstream] Deals Radiation 0.2 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Caustic 0.3 (if ReagentCondition)

Phenol.name: phenol
Phenol.desc: An aromatic ring of carbon with a hydroxyl group. A useful precursor to some medicines, but has no healing properties on its own.

Phlogiston.name: phlogiston

Phosphorus.name: phosphorus

Pielovene.name: Pielovene

Pilk.name: pilk

PinaColada.name: Piña Colada

PlantBGone.name: plant-B-gone

Plasma.name: plasma

Plasma.antagTips: Flammable gas. Can be released to cause fires. Component in many recipes. Available from dispensers.

Pluoxium.name: Pluoxium

PoisonWine.name: poison wine
PoisonWine.desc: Is this even wine? Toxic! Hallucinogenic! Probably consumed in boatloads by your superiors!

PolypyryliumOligomers.name: Polypyrylium Oligomers
PolypyryliumOligomers.desc: A purple mixture of short polyelectrolyte chains not easily synthesized in the laboratory. Heals asphyxiation and brute damage. Stops bleeding over time.
PolypyryliumOligomers.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Brute 1.75 (even) Heals Airloss 1 (even); [Bloodstream] Deals Asphyxiation 3.5 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Effect: ModifyBleed

PolytrinicAcid.name: polytrinic acid
PolytrinicAcid.desc: An extremely corrosive chemical substance. Severely burns anyone who comes directly into contact with it.
PolytrinicAcid.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Caustic 11.0; [Bloodstream] Message popup @33%; [Bloodstream] Emote: Scream @30%
PolytrinicAcid.antagTips: Extremely corrosive, severe burn damage. Combine with foam for area denial. Visible on contact — not stealthy.

Posca.name: posca
Posca.desc: Poor warriors' drink from a forgotten era.

Potassium.name: potassium
Potassium.desc: A soft, shiny grey metal. Even more reactive than lithium.
Potassium.antagTips: Explodes on contact with Water. Classic antag weapon: put both in a grenade or throw a beaker. 0.25 intensity per unit, max 100.

PotassiumIodide.name: potassium iodide
PotassiumIodide.desc: Will reduce the damaging effects of radiation by 90%. Prophylactic use only.

Primatine.name: Primatine
Primatine.effects: [Drink] Emote: MonkeyScreeches @18%; [Drink] Effect: Polymorph (if NFIsHumanoid, >50u); [Drink] Removes 20u Primatine (if >50u); [Drink] Status: Stutter

Probital.name: Probital
Probital.effects: [Medicine] Heals Brute 1.8 (if <20u); [Medicine] Vomit (if >20u) @2%; [Medicine] Effect: MovespeedModifier; [Medicine] Effect: MovespeedModifier (if >20u)

ProcenylLazide.name: Procenyl Lazide
ProcenylLazide.effects: [Medicine] Heals Slash 30 Heals Piercing 30 Heals Blunt 30; [Medicine] Adds 3u Bozaide; [Medicine] Deals Blunt 15 (if >6u); [Medicine] Bleed 1 (if >6u); [Medicine] Removes 25u Syriniver; [Medicine] Removes 50u Ebifin; [Medicine] Removes 25u ProcenylLazide; [Medicine] Removes 25u Aluite

Protein.name: protein
Protein.desc: Found in certain meals, good for bodily health.
Protein.effects: [Metabolites] Heals Brute 0.4 (even) @50%; [Metabolites] Blood level 1; [Metabolites] Hunger x1

Psicodine.name: psicodine
Psicodine.desc: Suppresses anxiety and other various forms of mental distress. Overdose causes hallucinations and minor toxin damage.
Psicodine.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 2 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Status: Jitter; [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Bloodstream] Message popup @20%

PulpedBananaPeel.name: pulped banana peel
PulpedBananaPeel.desc: Pulped banana peels have some effectiveness against bleeding.

PumpkinFlesh.name: pumpkin flesh
PumpkinFlesh.desc: The mushy, sweet remains of a pumpkin.

Puncturase.name: puncturase
Puncturase.desc: A fizzy chemical that helps rebuild trauma caused by piercing damage, leaving a slight amount of tissue damage behind.
Puncturase.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Piercing 2.5 Deals Radiation 0.05; [Bloodstream] Deals Blunt 3 (if ReagentCondition)

PwrGame.name: PWR Game
PwrGame.desc: The only drink with the PWR that true gamers crave. When a gamer talks about gamerfuel, this is what they're literally referring to.

Pyrazine.name: pyrazine
Pyrazine.desc: Efficiently heals burns from the hottest of fires. Causes massive internal bleeding when overdosed.
Pyrazine.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Heat 1; [Bloodstream] Deals Slash 0.5 Deals Piercing 0.5 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Vomit (if ReagentCondition) @10%; [Bloodstream] Emote: Scream (if ReagentCondition) @20%

Pyroxadone.name: Pyroxadone
Pyroxadone.effects: [Medicine] Heals Airloss 6 Heals Brute 4 Heals Burn 6 Heals Toxin 4 Heals Heat 3 (if temp cond)

RMCAluminum.name: aluminum
RMCAluminum.desc: A silver, soft, non-magnetic, and ductile metal.

RMCAntiZed.name: AntiZed
RMCAntiZed.desc: A chemical designed for use against Agent A0-3959X.91–15, colloquially known as the "Black Goo".
RMCAntiZed.effects: [Bloodstream] Effect: CureZombieInfection (if ReagentCondition); [Digestion] Effect: CureZombieInfection (if ReagentCondition); [Medicine] Effect: CureZombieInfection (if >5u)

RMCBGel.name: Napalm B-Gel
RMCBGel.desc: Unlike its liquid contemporaries, this gelled variant of napalm is easily extinguished, but shoots far and lingers on the ground in a viscous mess, while reacting with inorganic materials to ignite them.

RMCBatter.name: Batter
RMCBatter.desc: A mixture of flour and other elements, such as salt, egg, and milk.

RMCBlackGoo.name: Black Goo
RMCBlackGoo.desc: A strange substance of unknown origin. . .

RMCCLF3.name: Chlorine Trifluoride
RMCCLF3.desc: A highly reactive interhalogen compound capaple of self ignition. A very strong oxidizer and is extremely reactive with most organic and inorganic materials.

RMCCherryJelly.name: RMC Cherry Jelly
RMCCherryJelly.desc: Sweet jelly made from the cherry fruit.

RMCChloralhydrate.name: Chloral Hydrate
RMCChloralhydrate.desc: Chloral hydrate was the first synthetically produced sedative-hypnotic drug. It is a powerful sedative which causes near instant sleepiness, but can be deadly in large quantities. Often used together with other anesthetics for surgical procedures.
RMCChloralhydrate.effects: [Poison] Effect: Toxic; [Poison] Emote: Yawn @25%; [Poison] Status: Unconscious (if >15u); [Poison] Deals Asphyxiation 15 (if >25u)

RMCChlorine.name: chlorine
RMCChlorine.desc: A yellow-green gas which is toxic to humans.

RMCCitalopram.name: Citalopram
RMCCitalopram.desc: Citalopram is a drug used to treat depression, obsessive-compulsive disorder and panic disorder. It is considered safe for consumption and has been commonly available since 1998.

RMCCopper.name: copper
RMCCopper.desc: A soft, malleable, and ductile metal with very high thermal and electrical conductivity.

RMCCyanide.name: RMC Cyanide
RMCCyanide.desc: Cyanide is a naturally occurring toxic chemical, that has been used as a mean of killing for centuries because of its immediate effects. Symptoms include nausea, weakness, and difficulty breathing.

RMCEthanol.name: ethanol
RMCEthanol.desc: A simple alcohol, makes you drunk if consumed, flammable.
RMCEthanol.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x2; [Alcohol] Drunk; [Alcohol] Drunk (if >60u); [Alcohol] Deals Toxin 0.625 Deals Airloss 1.25 (if >60u); [Alcohol] Vomit (if >60u) @12%; [Alcohol] Drunk (if >100u); [Alcohol] Deals Toxin 1.2 Deals Airloss 2.5 (if >100u); [Alcohol] Vomit (if >100u) @25%

RMCFluorine.name: fluorine
RMCFluorine.desc: A highly toxic pale yellow gas. Extremely reactive.
RMCFluorine.effects: [Poison] Effect: Toxic; [Poison] Deals Burn 0.25 Deals Toxin 0.125; [Poison] Deals Burn 0.5 Deals Toxin 0.25 (if >30u)

RMCGenericToxin.name: RMC Generic Toxin
RMCGenericToxin.desc: General identification for many similar toxins, sometimes created as a byproduct through chemical reactions.

RMCGold.name: gold
RMCGold.desc: Gold is a dense, soft, shiny metal and the most malleable and ductile metal known.

RMCGrapeSoda.name: grape soda
RMCGrapeSoda.desc: Grapes made into a fine drank.

RMCIron.name: iron
RMCIron.desc: A silvery-grey metal which forms iron oxides (rust) with contact with air. Commonly alloyed with other elements to create alloys such as steel.

RMCLexorin.name: Lexorin
RMCLexorin.desc: Lexorin is an extremely dangerous compound that damages tissue and paralyzes the lungs, effectively stopping respiration. Can be deadly in even small doses. Lexorin is effectively countered by variants of dexalin.
RMCLexorin.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Asphyxiation 5 Deals Bloodloss 5; [Poison] Effect: Hypoxemic; [Poison] Effect: Biocidic

RMCLipozine.name: Lipozine
RMCLipozine.desc: Lowers satiation and reduces body weight by increasing ketosis and the rate of which fat is metabolized. Use to treat obesity. Large doses can cause extreme weight loss.

RMCLithium.name: lithium
RMCLithium.desc: A soft, silvery-white alkali metal. It's highly reactive, and ignites if it makes contact with water.
RMCLithium.effects: [Poison] Deals Poison 0.05; [Poison] Emote: Scream @5%; [Poison] Emote: Laugh @5%

RMCMercury.name: mercury
RMCMercury.desc: A silver metal which is liquid at room temperature. It's highly toxic to humans.

RMCMethane.name: Methane
RMCMethane.desc: An easily combustible hydrocarbon that can very rapidly expand a fire, even explosively at the right concentrations. It is used primarily as fuel to make heat and light or manufacturing of organic chemicals.

RMCMethylphenidate.name: Methylphenidate
RMCMethylphenidate.desc: A commonly prescribed psychostimulant that increases activity of the central nervous system. Often used to treat attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) and narcolepsy. This drug improves performance primarily in the executive function in the prefrontal cortex (reasoning, inhibiting behaviors, organizing, problem solving, planning ect.)

RMCMilkshake.name: milkshake
RMCMilkshake.desc: Just milk and ice cream. So simple.

RMCMindbreakerToxin.name: Mindbreaker Toxin
RMCMindbreakerToxin.desc: A powerful hallucinogenic compound that is illegal under Marine Law. Causes extreme hallucinations and is very addictive. Formerly known as LSD.
RMCMindbreakerToxin.effects: [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Poison] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Poison] Emote: Laugh @5%; [Poison] Jitter; [Poison] Status: Unconscious (if >50u)

RMCMolecularAcid.name: Diluted Molecular Acid
RMCMolecularAcid.desc: An acid of unknown composition, this sample doesn't seem to be as dangerous those found within Xenonid bloodstreams.
RMCMolecularAcid.effects: [Poison] Effect: Toxic; [Poison] Effect: Corrosive; [Poison] Message popup @20%

RMCNapalm.name: Napalm
RMCNapalm.desc: This will probably ignite before you get to read this.

RMCNapalmB.name: Napalm B
RMCNapalmB.desc: A special variant of napalm that's unable to cling well to anything, but disperses over a wide area while burning slowly. The composition reacts with inorganic materials to ignite them, causing severe damage.

RMCNapalmE.name: Napalm E
RMCNapalmE.desc: A sticky combustible liquid chemical that penetrates the best fire retardants.

RMCNapalmEX.name: Napalm EX
RMCNapalmEX.desc: A sticky combustible liquid chemical made up of a combonation of rare and dangerous reagents both that penetrates the best fire retardants, and burns extremely hot.

RMCNapalmHighCombustion.name: High-Combustion Napalm Fuel
RMCNapalmHighCombustion.desc: A custom napalm mix, higher damage but not as sticky.

RMCNapalmSticky.name: Sticky-Napalm
RMCNapalmSticky.desc: A custom napalm mix, stickier and lasts longer but lower damage.

RMCNapalmUT.name: UT-Napthal Fuel
RMCNapalmUT.desc: Known as Ultra Thick Napthal Fuel, a sticky combustible liquid chemical, typically used with flamethrowers.

RMCNapalmX.name: Napalm X
RMCNapalmX.desc: A sticky combustible liquid chemical that burns extremely hot.

RMCNitrogen.name: nitrogen
RMCNitrogen.desc: A colorless, odorless unreactive gas. Highly stable.

RMCParoxetine.name: Paroxetine
RMCParoxetine.desc: Very powerful antidepressant used to treat: major depressive disorder (MDD), obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD), social anxiety disorder (SAD), panic disorder, posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD), generalized anxiety disorder (GAD) and prenmenstrual dysphoric disorder (PMDD). Prolonged use may have side effects.
RMCParoxetine.effects: [Medicine] Message popup @5%; [Medicine] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Medicine] Jitter; [Medicine] Emote: Laugh @5%

RMCPhoron.name: Phoron
RMCPhoron.desc: A special form of metallic plasma that is not found on Earth. While phoron is highly flammable and extremely toxic, its high energy density makes it one of the best solid fuel alternatives. Liquid phoron is often used for research purposes and in the medical industry a catalyst to many advanced chemicals.

RMCPhosphorus.name: phosphorus
RMCPhosphorus.desc: A reactive metal used in pyrotechnics and weapons.

RMCPlatinum.name: platinum
RMCPlatinum.desc: A precious metal with a silvery-white appearance, known for its resistance to corrosion and high melting point.

RMCPotassium.name: potassium
RMCPotassium.desc: A soft, shiny grey metal. Even more reactive than lithium.

RMCPsilocybin.name: Psilocybin
RMCPsilocybin.desc: Psilocybin is a naturally occurring psychedelic prodrug compound produced by more than 200 species of mushrooms, collectively known as psilocybin mushrooms or Magic Mushrooms.
RMCPsilocybin.effects: [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Narcotic] Emote: Laugh @5%; [Narcotic] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Narcotic] Jitter (if >30u); [Narcotic] Status: Unconscious (if >50u)

RMCR189.name: R189
RMCR189.desc: A SPP chemical, it burns at an extremely high tempature and is designed to melt directly through fortified positions or bunkers.

RMCRadium.name: radium
RMCRadium.desc: A radioactive metal, silvery-white in its pure form. It glows due to its radioactivity and is highly toxic.

RMCRussianRed.name: Russian Red
RMCRussianRed.desc: An emergency radiation treatment. The list of potential side effects include retinal damage and unconsciousness.
RMCRussianRed.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Radiation 3 Deals Blunt 1.5; [Medicine] Effect: Antitoxic; [Medicine] Effect: Biocidic

RMCSilicon.name: silicon
RMCSilicon.desc: A hard and brittle crystalline solid with a blue-grey color.

RMCSilver.name: silver
RMCSilver.desc: A soft, white, lustrous transition metal, it has the highest electrical conductivity of any element and the highest thermal conductivity of any metal.

RMCSodium.name: sodium
RMCSodium.desc: A silvery-white alkali metal. Highly reactive in its pure form.

RMCSpaceDrugs.name: Space drugs
RMCSpaceDrugs.desc: An illegal compound that causes hallucinations, visual artefacts and loss of balance.
RMCSpaceDrugs.effects: [Bloodstream] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Narcotic] Emote: Laugh @5%; [Narcotic] Status: ModifyStatusEffect; [Narcotic] Jitter (if >30u); [Narcotic] Status: Unconscious (if >50u)

RMCSpecialBlendWhiskey.name: special blend whiskey
RMCSpecialBlendWhiskey.desc: Just when you thought regular station whiskey was good... This silky, amber goodness has to come along and ruin everything.

RMCSprinkles.name: Sprinkles
RMCSprinkles.desc: Multi-colored little bits of sugar, commonly found on donuts. Loved by cops.

RMCSulphuricAcid.name: sulphuric acid
RMCSulphuricAcid.desc: A corrosive chemical. Keep away from your face.

RMCSynthBlood.name: RMC Synth Blood
RMCSynthBlood.desc: A form of white latex. Used for the cooling of synthetic components.
RMCSynthBlood.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x1.0 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Digestion] Heals Brute 3 (even) Heals Burn 1.25 (even) (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.2

RMCUranium.name: uranium
RMCUranium.desc: A grey metallic chemical element in the actinide series, weakly radioactive.

RMCVirusFood.name: Virus Food
RMCVirusFood.desc: A mixture of water, milk, and oxygen. Virus cells can use this mixture to reproduce.

Radium.name: radium
Radium.desc: A radioactive metal, silvery-white in its pure form. It glows due to its radioactivity and is highly toxic.

Radler.name: radler
Radler.desc: A simple but staple classic, straight out of Space-Germany.

Razorium.name: razorium
Razorium.desc: A strange, non-newtonian chemical. It is produced when two conflicting brute medications are combined. When force is applied to it, it temporarily hardens creating millions of tiny, sharp edges. Very painful.
Razorium.effects: [Bloodstream] Deals Slash 9; [Bloodstream] Message popup @33%; [Bloodstream] Emote: Scream @30%

RedMead.name: red mead
RedMead.desc: The true Viking's drink! Even though it has a strange red color.

RegenerativeJelly.name: Regenerative Jelly
RegenerativeJelly.effects: [Medicine] Heals Burn 2 (even) Heals Toxin 2 (even) Heals Airloss 2 (even) Heals Brute 2 (even); [Medicine] Removes 0.5u RegenerativeJelly (if MetabolizerTypeCondition)

ResomiBlood.name: Resomi Blood
ResomiBlood.effects: [Digestion] Thirst x1.0 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Digestion] Heals Brute 3 (even) Heals Burn 1.25 (even) (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 0.2

Respiron.name: Respiron
Respiron.effects: [Poison] Oxygenates blood; [Gas] Oxygenates blood; [Gas] Effect: ModifyLungGas (if OrganType, OrganType, OrganType); [Gas] Effect: ModifyLungGas (if OrganType); [Gas] Effect: ModifyLungGas (if OrganType); [Gas] Effect: ModifyLungGas (if OrganType)

Revivopine.name: Revivopine
Revivopine.effects: [Medicine] Heals Airloss 10 Heals Brute 15 Heals Burn 20 (if TotalDamage)

Rewriter.name: Rewriter
Rewriter.desc: The secret of the sanctuary of the Librarian...

RobustHarvest.name: robust harvest
RobustHarvest.desc: A highly effective fertilizer with a limited potency-boosting effect on plants. Use it cautiously, as excessive application can reduce plant yield. It has a particularly beneficial effect on dionas.
RobustHarvest.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Poison 2 Heals Blunt 3 Heals Slash 3 Heals Piercing 3 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Asphyxiation 1 Deals Heat 2 Deals Poison 1 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition, ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Effect: Polymorph (if MetabolizerTypeCondition, ReagentCondition)

Romerol.name: romerol
Romerol.desc: An otherworldly concoction able to bring the undead to life. If untreated, the effects are irreversible and will bring certain doom upon the station. Handle with care.
Romerol.antagTips: Zombie virus reagent. Injecting into a corpse reanimates it as a hostile zombie. Maximum chaos potential.

RootBeer.name: root beer
RootBeer.desc: A very sweet, carbonated drink reminiscent of sarsaparilla. Goes well with ice cream.

RootBeerFloat.name: root beer float
RootBeerFloat.desc: Root beer, but now with ice cream on top. It truly is the magnum opus of Canadian summertime drinks.

Rororium.name: rororium
Rororium.desc: A strange substance which fills the cores of the hivelords that roam the mining asteroid. Thought to be the source of their regenerative powers.

RoyRogers.name: Roy Rogers
RoyRogers.desc: Solid proof that there IS something known as too sweet.

Rubberneck.name: rubberneck
Rubberneck.desc: A popular drink amongst those adhering to an all synthetic diet.

Rum.name: rum
Rum.desc: Distilled alcoholic drink made from sugarcane byproducts.

Sake.name: sake
Sake.desc: Alcoholic beverage made by fermenting rice that has been polished.

Salbutamol.name: Salbutamol
Salbutamol.effects: [Medicine] Heals Airloss 6 (if TotalDamage); [Medicine] Heals Airloss 1 (if TotalDamage); [Medicine] Heals Airloss 6 Deals Genetic 0.2 (if >15.5u)

SalicylicAcid.name: Salicylic Acid
SalicylicAcid.effects: [Medicine] Heals Brute 0.6 (if TotalDamage); [Medicine] Heals Brute 2.4 (if TotalDamage); [Medicine] Deals Burn 2 Heals Brute 2.4 (if >15.5u); [Medicine] Jitter (if >15.5u)

Saline.name: saline
Saline.desc: A mixture of salt and water. Commonly used to treat dehydration or low fluid presence in blood.

Saltpeter.name: Saltpeter
Saltpeter.effects: [Food] Hunger x1 (if OrganType); [Medicine] Heals Poison 1.2 Heals Blunt 0.4 Heals Slash 0.4 Heals Piercing 0.4 Heals Heat 0.8 Heals Cold 0.8 (if OrganType)

Sarin.name: Sarin
Sarin.effects: [Poison] Deals Poison 2; [Poison] Effect: MovespeedModifier; [Poison] Status: Stutter; [Poison] Jitter; [Poison] Paralyze (if >5u) @50%; [Poison] Message popup @8%; [Poison] Message popup (if >5u) @3%; [Poison] Emote: Scream @8%; [Poison] Status: TemporaryBlindness (if >2.5u)

Sbiten.name: sbiten
Sbiten.desc: A spicy Vodka! Might be a little hot for the little guys!

ScrewdriverCocktail.name: screwdriver
ScrewdriverCocktail.desc: Vodka, mixed with plain ol' orange juice. The result is surprisingly delicious.

Sedin.name: sedin
Sedin.desc: A modified version of diethylamine that can restore seeds on plants at the cost of potency.

ShamblersJuice.name: Shambler's Juice
ShamblersJuice.desc: ~Shake me up some of that Shambler's Juice!~

ShirleyTemple.name: Shirley Temple
ShirleyTemple.desc: A favorite amongst younger members of the crew.

ShroomMix.name: Shroom Mix
ShroomMix.effects: [Narcotic] Status: SeeingRainbows (if OrganType); [Narcotic] Emote: Laugh (if OrganType) @8%; [Narcotic] Emote: GoblinMutter (if OrganType) @5%; [Narcotic] Emote: Hiss (if OrganType) @2%; [Narcotic] Message popup (if OrganType) @5%; [Narcotic] Emote: Scream @1%; [Narcotic] Emote: Gasp @3%; [Narcotic] Jitter (if >1u, OrganType); [Narcotic] Vomit (if OrganType) @2%; [Narcotic] Thirst x-1 (if OrganType); [Narcotic] Hunger x-1 (if OrganType)

Sidecar.name: sidecar
Sidecar.desc: A drink fit for an army captain.

Siderlac.name: siderlac
Siderlac.desc: A powerful anti-caustic medicine derived from plants.

Sievertadone.name: Sievertadone
Sievertadone.effects: [Medicine] Heals Radiation 4 Heals Heat 3 (if temp cond)

Sigynate.name: sigynate
Sigynate.desc: A thick pink syrup useful for neutralizing acids and soothing trauma caused by acids. Tastes sweet!
Sigynate.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Caustic 1.25; [Bloodstream] Deals Heat 1 (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Jitter (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Message popup (if ReagentCondition) @20%; [Bloodstream] Vomit (if ReagentCondition) @2%; [Bloodstream] Vomit (if ReagentCondition) @10%; [Bloodstream] Message popup (if ReagentCondition) @20%

Silicon.name: silicon
Silicon.desc: A hard and brittle crystalline solid with a blue-grey color.

Silver.name: silver
Silver.desc: A soft, white, lustrous transition metal, it has the highest electrical conductivity of any element and the highest thermal conductivity of any metal.

Slime.name: slime
Slime.desc: You thought this was gradient blood at first, but you were mistaken.
Slime.effects: [Digestion] Hunger x1 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Digestion] Blood level 0.5 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition)

SoapReagent.name: soap
SoapReagent.desc: I wouldn't clean my mouth out with this if I were you.

SodaWater.name: soda water
SodaWater.desc: A container of club soda. Why not make a scotch and soda?

Sodium.name: sodium
Sodium.desc: A silvery-white alkali metal. Highly reactive in its pure form.

SodiumCarbonate.name: sodium carbonate
SodiumCarbonate.desc: A white, odorless, water-soluble salt that yields an alkaline solution in water.  Also known as soda ash.

SodiumHydroxide.name: sodium hydroxide
SodiumHydroxide.desc: A white, odorless, water-soluble salt that yields an strong alkaline solution in water. Causes burns and vomiting when ingested.

SodiumPolyacrylate.name: sodium polyacrylate
SodiumPolyacrylate.desc: A super-absorbent polymer with assorted industrial uses.

SolDry.name: Sol Dry
SolDry.desc: Sweet ginger soda from outer space!

SoyLatte.name: soy latte
SoyLatte.desc: A coffee drink made with espresso and steamed soy milk.

SpaceCleaner.name: space cleaner
SpaceCleaner.desc: This is able to clean almost all surfaces of almost anything that may dirty them. The janitor is likely to appreciate refills.

SpaceDrugs.name: space mirage
SpaceDrugs.desc: An illegal compound which induces a number of effects such as loss of balance and visual artefacts.
SpaceDrugs.antagTips: Causes hallucinations and stumbling. Low threat but good for distraction. Available from Ambrosia plants.

SpaceGlue.name: space glue
SpaceGlue.desc: Space Glue is a high performance glue intended for maintenance of extremely complex mechanical equipment (and certainly not used to make people stick to the floor).

SpaceLube.name: space lube
SpaceLube.desc: Space Lube is a high performance lubricant intended for maintenance of extremely complex mechanical equipment (and certainly not used to make people slip).

SpaceMountainWind.name: Space Solar Wind
SpaceMountainWind.desc: Blows right through you like a solar wind.

SpaceUp.name: Space-Up
SpaceUp.desc: Tastes like a hull breach in your mouth.

StabilisedStimulants.name: Stabilised Stimulants
StabilisedStimulants.effects: [Narcotic] Effect: MovespeedModifier; [Narcotic] Status: Stun; [Narcotic] Status: KnockedDown; [Narcotic] Status: Drowsiness (if <0.01u); [Narcotic] Status: Adrenaline

Starkist.name: Starkist
Starkist.desc: A sweet, orange flavored soft drink.

Stasicillin.name: Stasicillin
Stasicillin.effects: [Medicine] Heals Airloss 6 Heals Toxin 4 Heals Brute 4.5 Heals Burn 6 (if >11u); [Medicine] Status: ForcedSleep (if >11u)

Stasizium.name: Stasizium
Stasizium.effects: [Medicine] Blood level 10; [Medicine] Bleed -2; [Medicine] Effect: ReduceRotting (if MobStateCondition); [Medicine] Heals Brute 20 Heals Burn 20 Heals Airloss 20 Heals Toxin 20 Heals Genetic 20; [Medicine] Deals Blunt 100 (if >21u); [Medicine] Temp -50000 (if temp cond)

Stellibinin.name: stellibinin
Stellibinin.desc: A natual anti-toxin with particular effectiveness against amatoxin.

Stelloxadone.name: Stelloxadone
Stelloxadone.effects: [Cryogenic] Deals Brute 3 Heals Poison 6 Heals Radiation 3 (if temp cond); [Cryogenic] Bleed -1.5 (if temp cond)

Stimulants.name: hyperzine
Stimulants.desc: A chemical cocktail developed by Donk Co. that allows agents to recover from stuns faster, move more quickly, and grants a small heal when you're more dead than alive. Due to the complex nature of the chemical, it is much harder for the body to purge naturally.

SwissLemonade.name: swiss lemonade
SwissLemonade.desc: Funny enough, it's not actually swiss, or have any lemons!

SyndicateBomb.desc: Somebody set us up the bomb!

TableSalt.desc: Commonly known as salt, Sodium Chloride is often used to season food or kill borers instantly.

Tazinide.antagTips: Electrifying mixture that disrupts movement and causes shock damage. Target is slowed and stunned periodically. Also toxic.

Tea.name: tea
Tea.desc: A drink made by boiling leaves of the tea tree, Camellia sinensis.

TeaPowder.name: tea powder
TeaPowder.desc: Finely ground tea leaves, used for making tea.

TearGas.name: tear gas
TearGas.desc: A chemical that causes severe irritation and crying, commonly used in riot control.
TearGas.effects: [Bloodstream] Message popup @8%; [Bloodstream] Message popup @3%; [Bloodstream] Emote: Scream (if ReagentCondition) @8%; [Bloodstream] Emote: Cough @8%; [Bloodstream] Status: TemporaryBlindness (if ReagentCondition); [Bloodstream] Speed walk=0.65 sprint=0.65 (if ReagentCondition)
TearGas.antagTips: Causes eye irritation, blurred vision, and slowing. Excellent in smoke grenades for area denial and crowd control.

Tehifin.name: Tehifin

Tequila.name: tequila
Tequila.desc: A strong and mildly flavoured, mexican produced spirit.

TequilaSunrise.name: tequila sunrise
TequilaSunrise.desc: Tequila and orange juice. Much like a Screwdriver, only Mexican.

Terratosomochromolin.name: Terratosomochromolin

TheMartinez.name: The Martinez
TheMartinez.desc: The edgerunner legend. Remembered by a drink, forgotten by a drunk.

TheSunAlsoRises.name: the sun also rises
TheSunAlsoRises.desc: A strong cocktail mixed into a murky blend. A secret favorite of tortured authors.

Theobromine.name: theobromine
Theobromine.desc: A bitter alkaloid of the cacao plant, commonly found in chocolate. Do not feed to animals.

Thermite.name: thermite
Thermite.desc: A mixture that becomes extremely hot when ignited.
Thermite.antagTips: Melts walls and doors when applied and ignited. Essential for breaching secured areas. Apply to wall, then use a lighter/welder.

ThreeMileIsland.name: Three Mile Island iced tea
ThreeMileIsland.desc: "Made for a woman, strong enough for a man."

TonicWater.name: tonic water

Tortuga.name: Tortuga
Tortuga.desc: Perfect for pirates who’ve been selected as the designated driver. Yarr!

Toxin.name: toxin
Toxin.desc: An unsurprisingly toxic chemical. Available at an emagged chem dispenser.

ToxinTrash.name: reprocessed material
ToxinTrash.desc: An awful-smelling slurry efficiently refined from discarded matter. It represents a perfect, zero-waste conversion of salvage into Vox sustenance, though it is a violent poison to others.

ToxinsSpecial.name: toxins special
ToxinsSpecial.desc: This thing is ON FIRE! CALL THE DAMN SHUTTLE!

TranexamicAcid.name: tranexamic acid
TranexamicAcid.desc: A blood-clotting medicine used to prevent profuse bleeding. Causes heavier bleeding on overdose. Commonly found in small doses within emergency medipens.

Tricordrazine.name: tricordrazine
Tricordrazine.desc: A wide-spectrum stimulant, originally derived from cordrazine. Treats minor damage of all basic health types as long as the user is not heavily wounded. Best used as an additive to other chemicals.
Tricordrazine.effects: [Bloodstream] Heals Brute 1 (even) Heals Burn 1 (even) (if MobStateCondition); [Bloodstream] Heals Poison 0.5 (if MobStateCondition)

UnstableMutagen.name: unstable mutagen
UnstableMutagen.desc: Causes mutations when injected into living people or plants. High doses may be lethal, especially in humans.
UnstableMutagen.antagTips: Irradiates everything nearby. Use in smoke for area radiation contamination. Also mutates plants in botany.

Uranium.name: uranium
Uranium.desc: A grey metallic chemical element in the actinide series, weakly radioactive.

VentCrud.name: vent crud
VentCrud.desc: A jet black substance found in poorly maintained ventilation systems. Can cause vent cough.

Vermouth.name: vermouth
Vermouth.desc: Aromatized, fortified white wine flavored with various botanicals.

Vodka.name: vodka
Vodka.desc: Clear distilled alcoholic beverage that originates from Poland and Russia.

VodkaMartini.name: vodka martini
VodkaMartini.desc: Vodka instead of Gin. Not quite how 007 enjoyed it, but still delicious.

VodkaRedBool.name: vodka red bool
VodkaRedBool.desc: Because heart failure and liver failure go hand in hand.

VodkaTonic.name: vodka tonic
VodkaTonic.desc: For when a gin and tonic isn't russian enough.

Vomit.desc: You can see a few chunks of someone's last meal in it.

Water.name: water
Water.desc: A colorless liquid that humans need in order to survive.

WatermelonWakeup.name: watermelon wakeup
WatermelonWakeup.desc: If you want to be awake, this will do it... Also sweet.

WeedKiller.name: weed killer
WeedKiller.desc: A mixture that targets weeds. Very effective against kudzu. While useful it slowly poisons plants with toxins, be careful when using it.

WeldingFuel.name: welding fuel
WeldingFuel.effects: [Bloodstream] Thirst x1 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Deals Poison 1 (if MetabolizerTypeCondition); [Bloodstream] Flammable
WeldingFuel.antagTips: Flammable base chemical. Component of Napalm. Also used in Acetone synthesis. Available from dispensers.

Whiskey.name: whiskey
Whiskey.desc: A type of distilled alcoholic beverage made from fermented grain mash.

WhiskeyCola.name: whiskey cola
WhiskeyCola.desc: Whiskey, mixed with cola. Surprisingly refreshing.

WhiskeySour.name: whiskey sour
WhiskeySour.desc: What's the secret ingredient? Eggs. It's eggs.

WhiteGilgamesh.name: White Gilgamesh
WhiteGilgamesh.desc: A sickening mixture of milk and beer. Makes you feel like you're made of wood.

WhiteRussian.name: White Russian
WhiteRussian.desc: That's just, like, your opinion, man...

Wine.name: wine
Wine.desc: A premium alcoholic beverage made from distilled grape juice.

XenoBasher.name: Xeno Basher
XenoBasher.desc: The perfect drink before an expedition.

Zinc.name: zinc
Zinc.desc: A silvery, brittle metal, often used in batteries to carry charge.

ZombieBlood.name: zombie blood
ZombieBlood.desc: Would not advise eating. Can be used to create an inoculation against the infection.

ZombieCocktail.name: Zombie
ZombieCocktail.desc: It gets in your head. Your he-eyeh-ead.

antagStrategies.name: Silent Kill
antagStrategies.desc: Classic assassination. Chloral Hydrate puts target to sleep, Lexorin finishes them via asphyxiation. No noise, no evidence.

antagStrategies.name: Acid Foam
antagStrategies.desc: Fluorosurfactant + Water creates foam that carries Polytrinic Acid across a wide area. Devastating corridor denial.

antagStrategies.name: Mass Chaos
antagStrategies.desc: Potassium + Water = instant detonation. Put maximum amounts in a two-chamber grenade for a devastating explosion.

antagStrategies.name: Toxic Smoke
antagStrategies.desc: Smoke reaction (P+K+Sugar) disperses ALL beaker contents as gas. Add any lethal toxin for area-of-effect killing.

antagStrategies.name: Fire & Forget
antagStrategies.desc: Napalm carried by foam creates persistent fire corridors. Targets are set on fire with sticky napalm that's hard to extinguish.

antagStrategies.name: Slow Poisoning
antagStrategies.desc: Lead or Histamine in food/drinks. Damage accumulates slowly — victim may not realize they're being poisoned for minutes.

antagStrategies.name: Sedation Ambush
antagStrategies.desc: Double sedative combo. Chloral Hydrate for fast sleep + Nocturine to keep them down. Ideal for kidnapping.

antagStrategies.name: Flash & Grab
antagStrategies.desc: Flash Powder (Al+K+S) blinds everyone in an area. Use for smash-and-grab operations or escape cover.

antagStrategies.name: Wall Breach
antagStrategies.desc: Apply Thermite to wall, ignite with lighter/welder. Melts through reinforced walls and blast doors. Essential for breaking into secure areas.

antagStrategies.name: Radiation Zone
antagStrategies.desc: Unstable Mutagen in smoke creates a radiation contamination zone. Everyone in the area takes radiation damage over time.

antagStrategies.name: CLF3 Armageddon
antagStrategies.desc: Chlorine Trifluoride — the ultimate destruction chemical. Burns everything, melts walls, toxic fumes. Synthesize above 370K in a shatterproof container or it WILL explode in your hands.

antagStrategies.name: Silence & Kill
antagStrategies.desc: Mute Toxin prevents target from calling for help on radio. Combined with Lexorin for a kill they can't report.

Syringe.desc: Direct injection — target sees attacker and gets a combat log message. 15u capacity.

Hypospray.desc: Silent injection, no combat message to bystanders. 30u capacity. Requires CMO/medical access.

SmokeBomb.desc: Phosphorus+Potassium+Sugar reaction disperses ALL beaker chemicals as smoke cloud covering a wide area.

FoamGrenade.desc: Fluorosurfactant+Water creates foam carrying all other chemicals. Spreads on floor, makes surfaces slippery.

Food.desc: Inject reagents into food items. Target consumes voluntarily — zero suspicion if undetected.

Drink.desc: Slip reagents into existing drinks. Flavor may give it away — use tasteless chemicals for best results.

Pill.desc: Pill capsule holding up to 50u. Can be color-matched to look like medicine. Victim must swallow.

Beaker.desc: Standard beaker (50u). Throw at target to splash contents. Visible and obvious attack.

LargeBeaker.desc: Large beaker (100u). More capacity for bigger splash area.

BluespaceBeaker.desc: Bluespace beaker (300u). Enormous capacity — enough chemicals for a devastating attack.

SyndicateHypospray.desc: Looks like a normal hypospray but is a Syndicate tool. Silent injection, 25u capacity. Available from traitor uplink.

Telecrystal.desc: Currency for the traitor uplink. Spend on tools, weapons, and equipment. Not a chemical delivery device.
